description:
Return a list of all Tax Codes for a given Company

When tax suport is enabled in Procore you can associate line items
with a specific Tax Code. The Tax Code (sometimes known as a Tax Group)
determines the tax rate to be applied to the line item for each Tax Type
defined in Procore (Note that presently Procore only supports a single
Tax Type per company).

You may define as many Tax Codes as required. Through the web interface, a
Procore admin user may identify one of these tax codes as the d...

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Expect number of items in response. min: 1, max: 100

id.description: The ID of the Tax Code

origin_data.description: Additional Third-party Metadata for the Tax Code. Note: This is a free-form text field.

origin_id.description: The Third-party ID of the Tax Code

rate1.description: Rate to apply for first Tax Type

archived.description: Set to true if this tax code has been archived

default_tax_code.description: Set to true if this tax code is default tax code
